bash.code:
#!/bin/bash
# SaaS API Examples using curl

# Salesforce - Create Lead
SF_TOKEN="your_access_token"
SF_INSTANCE="https://yourinstance.salesforce.com"

curl -X POST "$SF_INSTANCE/services/data/v57.0/sobjects/Lead" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $SF_TOKEN" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
        "FirstName": "John",
        "LastName": "Doe",
        "Email": "john@example.com",
        "Company": "Acme Inc"
    }'

# HubSpot - Create Contact
HUBSPOT_KEY="your_api_key"

curl -X POST "https://api.hubapi.com/crm/v3/objects/contacts" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $HUBSPOT_KEY" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
        "properties": {
            "email": "john@example.com",
            "firstname": "John",
            "lastname": "Doe"
        }
    }'

# Stripe - Create Customer
STRIPE_KEY="sk_test_your_key"

curl https://api.stripe.com/v1/customers \
    -u $STRIPE_KEY: \
    -d email="customer@example.com" \
    -d name="John Doe"

# Twilio - Send SMS
TWILIO_SID="your_account_sid"
TWILIO_TOKEN="your_auth_token"

curl -X POST "https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/$TWILIO_SID/Messages.json" \
    -u "$TWILIO_SID:$TWILIO_TOKEN" \
    -d "From=+1234567890" \
    -d "To=+0987654321" \
    -d "Body=Hello from SaaS!"

# SendGrid - Send Email
SENDGRID_KEY="your_api_key"

curl -X POST "https://api.sendgrid.com/v3/mail/send" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $SENDGRID_KEY" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
        "personalizations": [{
            "to": [{"email": "recipient@example.com"}]
        }],
        "from": {"email": "sender@example.com"},
        "subject": "Hello from SaaS",
        "content": [{"type": "text/plain", "value": "Hello!"}]
    }'
